TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_buya

S.FORM: yau baqiAN ‘nay usiq matiw ta nipalumaanna tu sinsuli.
S.TRANSL: 有一個老人去他種李子的果園。
There was an old man who went to the orchard where he grew plums.

S.FORM: titaanna muaza sinsulina nengi ti alaan zinna nani.
S.TRANSL: (He) saw many plums that were ready to be plucked.

S.FORM: kyalaanna ti sinsulina.
pipitanna nani.
pizyaanna taqanasanna.
utulu ti qanas ‘nay.
utulu qanas ’nay nani uzusa pungiR ti niizananna nani nipipitanna tu sinsuli.
S.TRANSL: 那三個籃子，有兩個裝滿摘的李子。
Two of the three baskets were full the plums he plucked

S.FORM: nani tangi yau ‘nay usiq lazat ’nay kmawit tu sizi mlazyu takinilanna.
S.TRANSL: 過了一會兒，有一個牽著一隻羊的人經過他的旁邊。
A while later, there was a man who pulled along a goat passing him by.

S.FORM: …nani …Raylikuzna uman nani yau ti sunis ’nay QAzitinsya maseq titaanna.
S.TRANSL: 後面又有一個孩子騎腳踏車到達(那邊)。
A child rode a bicycle in the backside and arrived there.

S.FORM: baqian ‘nay yau ta babaw na paRin na sinsuli nani.
S.TRANSL: （他）看到那個老人在李子樹上。
(He) saw the old man is up on the plum tree.

S.FORM: azu ti sa supa supaRanna.
nani tmitana baqian ‘nay mai mai ma titaanna baqian ‘nay sayza nani.
S.TRANSL: The old man was not paying attention.

S.FORM: …alaanna sunis ‘nay usiq ‘nay qanas ‘nay sinsuli ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: The child took a basket of plum.

S.FORM: QAYRuziqanna sepawanna tazitinsyaanna nani.
S.TRANSL: 把偷來的籃子放在腳踏車。
and put the basket he stole on the bicycle

S.FORM: wiya ti smaqay.
simqatapung tu usiq ay ‘nay QAzitinsya tazungan nani.
S.TRANSL: (他) 遇到一個騎腳踏車的女孩。
(He) met a girl who rode a bicycle.

S.FORM: manbaseR ‘nay qubuna ya.
nani tita paiku tu qubuku zinna sayza nani.
S.TRANSL: “I am going to see my hat.” he said.

S.FORM: tangi ita.
Raynguanna tangayawan yau betu ’nay usiq nani zuquRanna betu ’nay …msuRaw ti.
S.TRANSL: (他)不知道前面有一顆石頭，撞到那顆石頭跌倒了。
(He) did not know that there was a stone ahead, bumped into the stone and fell.

S.FORM: suRaw nani.
bibyaq ti ‘nay ti mtabuk ti na pa na iza nay sinsulina nani.
titaanna kini yau kinita kintulu nani sunis ‘nay kintulu ay tmita nani titaanna msuRaw sa sunis ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩看見那個小孩跌倒了。
The three children saw the child fell.

S.FORM: misis mayzipana tu eh m tu.
S.TRANSL: 把他和他的腳踏車扶起來。
helped him and his bicycle up.

S.FORM: zitinsyana nani kawitanna ti wiya ti.
S.TRANSL: (他) 牽著（他的腳踏車）走了。

S.FORM: mRaRiu ti wiyati ‘nay kaputna kintulu ‘nay nani titaanna ta tuRuz yau qubuna.
S.TRANSL: (They) saw that there is a hat in behind.

S.FORM: qeRasanna qubusu zau zinna en zinna.
S.TRANSL: （他們）叫 「這是你的帽子嗎？」「嗯」他說。
(They) yelled, “ Is this your hat?” “Hmm,” he said.

S.FORM: taliqulanna siqubuanna ti nani.
S.TRANSL: He looked back and wore the hat.

S.FORM: mala tu utulu ‘nay sinsuli sinapunanna ti kintulu alaanna nani.
S.TRANSL: 拿三個李子，分給三個小孩。
(He) took three plums, and distributed them to the three child.

S.FORM: wiya ti qaniyau mananna nani.
ey kintulu ‘nay sunis ‘nay mlazyu tu baqian ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩經過那個老人。
The three children passed the old man.

S.FORM: tu sinsuli ‘nay tu paRin ‘nay nani titaanna baqian ‘nay.
mana sinsuliku uzusa ti taqanasan nani mana usiq ti ma zinna.
S.TRANSL: 「為什麼我的兩籃李子只剩一籃?」，他說。
“Why the two baskets of plums of mine becomes one basket?” He said.

S.FORM: mai tu niimetan.
pameng ti mngangaR tya tmita.
mai ti ‘nay usiq ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 「我的那一籃李子不見了。」他說。
“That basket of plums of mine is gone.” He said.

S.FORM: qmusqus tu uRu.
pameng ti ya.
…zi sa ya qay suqiqirnil ti uRuna tayan.
nayawma ka ‘nay titaanku tangi.
